message:
feat(charmed_log): add performance documentation and runtime warning for caller reporting

- Add performance warning documentation to set_report_caller(), Options::report_caller,
  and CallerInfo::capture() explaining the 100-1000x overhead
- Add warned_caller_overhead and suppress_caller_warning fields to LoggerInner
- Emit one-time runtime warning on first log call with caller reporting enabled
- Add suppress_caller_warning() method to silence the warning when intentional
- Add unit tests for warning behavior, suppression, and inheritance

Implements bd-2go9.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
